title: Work Operation
description: Schema for a discrete work operation within a scope of work. Each operation represents a single constructible task with defined prerequisites, sequencing, and weather constraints.

operation_id.description: Unique identifier for this work operation.

scope_ref.description: Reference to the parent scope_of_work record.

trade_ref.description: Reference to the trade_responsibility record for this operation.

sequence_position.description: Ordinal position within the scope execution sequence.

prerequisites.description: References to operations or conditions that must be complete before this operation begins.

duration_estimate.description: Estimated duration for this operation (e.g., '2 days', '4 hours').

weather_constraints.description: Weather limitations for this operation (temperature range, wind speed, precipitation).
